Testimonial Project – EMAIL & PHONE





EMAIL SEND

Email sent to all customers who have reordered product – 

thanking them for being a loyal customer and offering a free gift available exclusively to them in return for a video testimonial

Email sent 6AM EST

CUSTOMER SERVICE REACHOUTS



Once the email has a decent open rate – Customer Service (Turtle Peak in our case) calls customers to follow up. In addition to outbound calls, any customers calling in to refund are automatically offered as well. Our call center is generally unscripted but the following is the gist of what they say: 



“Hi! my name is (name) calling from the (product name) customer support team. I noticed that you’ve bought the (product name) product on a few separate occasions, and I am calling with an opportunity for you to receive a few free bottles as a way of saying Thank You!” 



“We’re currently offering our customers 3 FREE bottles of (product) just for sending in a video testimonial!”



Agents are trained to ask for a video testimonial first and foremost, if they decline they ask for a photo with a text quote, id they decline that too then just a text quote. We offer different gifts in return at each level. 



Video: 3 Bottles

Quote + Pic: 2 Bottles

Quote Only: 1 Bottle



Agents also have $50 Visa Gift Cards to send at their disposal but ONLY if we need to, and ONLY for video testimonials. So far, 3 bottles of product have done the trick and we have not used the gift card option at all. 



Once the testimonial is received on our end (video/image/text files sent over via email) – we let our agents know and a campaign in CRM is used to send out the gifts free of charge.



***To entice our agents to go after these testimonials – we also offered a $100 Visa Gift Card to the agent that collects the most testimonials.
